name: nos-tour-stage-winner
description: Vote on the predicted winner of each 2026 Tour de France stage.

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.predev: ([ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env) && ([ -f frontend/.env ] || cp frontend/.env.example frontend/.env) && ([ -d backend/node_modules ] || npm --prefix backend install) && ([ -d frontend/node_modules ] || npm --prefix frontend install)
scripts.dev: npm run dev:db && (npm run dev:sync || echo 'sync failed (continuing) — run npm run dev:sync manually') && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:db: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d database
